mapper.select: SELECT c.course_id AS courseId, m.code AS code, m.name AS name, s.academic_year AS academicYear, c.mid_score AS midScore, c.fin_score AS finScore, c.assignment_score AS assignmentScore, c.attend_score AS attendScore, c.total_score AS totalScore, c.grade_letter AS gradeLetter FROM course c LEFT JOIN student s ON c.member_id = s.member_id LEFT JOIN member m ON s.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.lecture_id = #{lectureId} ORDER BY m.name ASC
